description: Discuss exam anxiety, study pressure, academic expectations, and finding balance between studies and personal life.
Share experiences about friendships, romantic relationships, family dynamics, and building a social support network on campus.
Open conversations about mental health topics, breaking stigma, sharing personal stories, and supporting each other.
Tips and discussions about self-care routines, exercise, nutrition, sleep, and overall wellness for a healthy college experience.
Discuss worries about placements, career choices, future uncertainty, and finding your path after college.
